# frontend flow review template

## Flow summary

What the user is trying to do and what changed.

## Must fix

- Issue — impact — likely direction
- Issue — impact — likely direction

## Should improve

- Improvement — reason
- Improvement — reason

## State gaps

- Missing state or weak transition
- Missing state or weak transition

## Contract or backend assumptions

- Assumption or mismatch
- Assumption or mismatch

## Readiness judgment

One of:

- Ready
- Ready with caution
- Not ready
